case_title: NZEREM, MARCEL VS NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NZEREM, MARCEL AS TO DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC KLM ROYAL DUTCH AIRLINES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-1999 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NZEREM, MARCEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTHWEST AIRLINES, INC KLM ROYAL DUTCH AIRLINES $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,026.00, KLM ROYAL DUTCH AIRLINES IS ADDED AS A DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
